title: Zara India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Zara India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Zara India! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Varanasi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Zara India:
Zara India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zara India!
